title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development: Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Compound Engineering, Higgsfield, Anthropic Skill Creator, Anthropic Legal, Anthropic Frontend Design, and others. The plugins add capabilities like web scraping, media generation, and model swapping to extend Claude's functionality.
